data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Minimizing user decision time during navigation on the interface.
data.technical_spec: Simplified menu options and search features to reduce cognitive load.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Improving accessibility of targets for navigation and selection.
data.technical_spec: Large, easily clickable buttons and responsive UI elements.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Enhancing user perception of ease of use through visual design.
data.technical_spec: Sleek, modern interface with high contrast and clean layouts.

data.title: Serial Position Effect
data.description: Ensuring important content placement in prime viewing areas.
data.technical_spec: Key content and features placed in top and bottom areas of UI.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Leveraging user familiarities to improve navigation experiences.
data.technical_spec: Design patterns familiar to users from similar services.
